description_long: This ferry is a large, multi-deck vessel with a streamlined, elongated hull painted in white and red. The superstructure features two prominent passenger decks, each lined with large, rectangular windows that provide panoramic views. A tall, black smokestack rises from the center of the upper deck, serving as a visually dominant feature. The bow is sharply pointed, while the stern is rounded, both ends capped with railings and windows. The exterior is primarily smooth and hard, with metallic and glass surfaces dominating the construction. The ferry is designed for urban waterways, capable of carrying numerous passengers and possibly vehicles, with multiple entry points visible along the sides.
description: A large, white and red multi-deck ferry with panoramic windows and a prominent central smokestack, designed for urban water transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, curved white superstructure, and the central smokestack.
description_view_1: Side view revealing two full-length passenger decks with large windows and the tall smokestack at the center.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded stern, rear windows, and the back of the smokestack.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with clear visibility of the decks, windows, and smokestack.
